_note: The 3 marquee players featured for the July 2026 window. Only identity + market value are curated here; per-player STATS are looked up live from src.data.load_stathead_2526() (2025/26 real data + goals-proxy xG) by matching `name` against the Stathead `Player` column. current_club must match a team_name in the transfer history so the player's own club is excluded from destination candidates. prior_market_value_eur is the latest Transfermarkt value (hand-entered, EUR).
_framing: All three are franchise cornerstones at Barcelona/Real Madrid and unlikely to actually move in 2026. The report frames the output as 'model-implied market value + best-fit destination IF they were to move', not a literal transfer prediction.
